elements.name: Execute complete workflow for Cabs, Gift Cards, and Hotels

steps.name: User is on MakeMyTrip Home Page
User enters "Delhi" as From location and "Manali,Himachal Pradesh" as To location
User selects pickup time "10:30 AM" and clicks Apply
User should see available cab options
The lowest cab price should be displayed

steps.name: User selects Gift Cards and switches to the new tab
User selects the Wedding Gift Card
User clicks Buy Now and captures a screenshot
User checks maximum adult capacity in Hotels
